title: euphrasia stricta subsp. edouardii
intro: Euphrasia stricta subsp. edouardii, also known as Edouard's eye-bright, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the gentian family (Gentianaceae). It is a perennial herb native to the high-altitude regions of the Himalayas and has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as soothing eye irritations, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory issues, due to its expectorant properties. Euphrasia stricta subsp. edouardii is commonly prepared as an herbal infusion or tincture, which can be used to make eye drops, teas, or syrups, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using any herbal remedy.
